result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 13:   JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '1 year')::timestamp AS start_dt,
    (DATE '2023-04-10')::timestamp AS end_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.end_dt
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '1 year')::timestamp AS start_dt,
    (DATE '2023-04-10')::timestamp AS end_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN bounds b ON ch.createddate >= b.start_dt AND ch.createddate < b.end_dt
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '1 year')::timestamp AS start_dt,
    (DATE '2023-04-10')::timestamp AS end_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE ch.createddate::timestamp >= b.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp < b.end_dt
    AND LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    UNION
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

result.preview: "No agent found: no owner-assignment (CaseHistory) records in the last 4 quarters (2022-04-10 to 2023-04-10) to compute transfers/handled cases."
